name: Baked Custard (Diabetic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, granulated sugar (nutrient replacement), salt, vanilla, and eggs in a large bowl. Beat until well blended.
2. Pour the mixture into six 1/2 cup individual baking dishes. Sprinkle each dish with nutmeg.
3. Place the cups in a large baking pan. Add 1 inch of water to the bottom of the pan.
4. Bake the custard at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
